What's going on everyone? Welcome to GymLaunch. I will be your host for the majority of this training. We're super honored to have you. Thank you for trusting us with your business. I promise you are in very, very good hands, or the very least, very experienced hands. We've done this a lot, a lot of times. And so we've made iteration after iteration to make this process more and more effective and simpler and simpler to execute. That being said, ultimately what we're gonna try and do here with you is build the entire machine that is going to bring clients in on the front end profitably for you as a business owner. And then help you design from those customers, which will enable this entire machine to work and ultimately grow your gym and help you make more dollars. All right, so this is just a thousand foot overview to kind of paint the picture of what we're gonna be necessary platforms. So most of those are software platforms. You're gonna sign up for those and then we're gonna help you tie those, you how to run ads for an external play, which is just like a marketing play to cold traffic. People who don't want to be the highest-growing place. If there's another play that is higher converting, it may be that. All right, you will work the leads once they start coming in through the machine. Then when they come in, you will sell them service. So you'll sell them fitness services at your gym for a defined period of time at a higher ticket than you normally would. All right, that's what's going to allow you to cash flow the campaign longer lifespans and also higher flip rates. All right, so then after you sell them service, you're gonna sell them product, all right, to make even more on the front end, get to it in a second. All right, and so after you sell them the service and you sell them product, that's when you feel like crazy, absolutely over deliver and crush it. And then you should flip, and that is how this whole machine works. I wanna be clear here that the goal of this machine is to build your EFT, is the point is to build the recurring. And I wanna make sure everyone's very clear on that. All right, this business is not to create some churn machine for you because your gym isn't good. All right, many people feel when they come in that they need more customers. And when it's happening is when they get more customers, they lose them because they don't have good operational systems to retain and provide value. You're gonna see them because that's going to be the stability that's gonna be the base of your business, right? So I just wanna be clear about that. Now, after we make you tons of money, then you will see success, okay? So what we do in Legacy is basically showing it is continuing to add even more product and you do it with more time and more stability. So you always know at the beginning of the month you have all your bills and what you wanna take home, taken care of. All right, that's the point. All right, so we help you build that machine I just like to put the averages underneath. Those averages were self-reported from our gym lords at our last gym lords event, which was in January, 2019 at the making of this video. The average gym increased their revenue by $240,000 a year. The average gym was made $549,000 in revenue. So if those numbers are above what you're at, then it might be something to consider after you are done or halfway through your launch process. They also 3.03x their profit. So they more than triple their profit by implementing the systems on that side to increase the profitability of the facility. They increase life-streaming of every customer by 52%, which is pretty bonkers. So that shows you that this is not just an acquisition machine but also if you implement the rest of the systems that we will show you on the service side, you will make more by providing more value. All right, and then by extension, they were able to decommodiatize theirself by providing more value. Not my number one, my top 5%, like these are averages.
